description: CompositionMaroonish brown round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, snipped edge detailing on the neckline and hem, patch work and embroidery on the front and appliqued tab at the bottomFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry clean Crafted for surfers, this maroonish brown tee from s.oliver will urge you to head to California in search of that perfect wave this summer. Experience heavenly softness in this t-shirt as you relax on the beach all day long. Pair it with shorts on the beach, or team it with jeans for a casual day out with friends. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
